title: Randomized Items
description: Random Items every set amount of times!
body:
# **Random Item Mod**

The **Random Item** mod is a fun and unique mod that is compatible with any mod and vanilla items! Every player on the server receives a random item at regular intervals, keeping the gameplay exciting and unpredictable. Whether you're using items from vanilla Minecraft or your favorite mods, the **Random Item** mod ensures that every item in the game has a chance to be gifted to players even the creative items such as Bedrock!!!
## 
## Key Features:

Random Item Distribution: Players receive a random item from the entire item registry, including items from other mods, ensuring endless possibilities.
Customizable Timing: Use the /setinterval <time_in_seconds> command to adjust how frequently players receive random items. Customize the interval to suit your server's gameplay style, whether you want items to drop every few seconds or only occasionally.
Mod Compatibility: This mod is fully compatible with other mods, integrating all custom items into the random item pool for a truly diverse experience.

Feel free to use this mod in modpacks please just give credit! You can also create youtube videos just please link the curseforge/modrinth page!


### 
### If you need to contact me @Mattias15 is my discord.
